stories.title: Takeaways from Spurs-Timberwolves Game 3
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next -- for the 76ers-Knicks, Cavs-Pistons, Wolves-Spurs and Lakers-Thunder series.

stories.title: Brunson shuts door on 76ers as Knicks go up 3-0
stories.summary: Behind 33 points from Jalen Brunson, including big buckets late, the Knicks held off the 76ers to take a commanding 3-0 lead in the semifinal series.

stories.title: Historic heat: Misiorowski tops 103 mph 10 times
stories.summary: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Jacob Misiorowski threw 10 pitches of at least 103 mph Friday and produced the highest velocity any starter has reached since Statcast tracking began in 2008.

stories.title: UCLA's Grant ties softball single-season HR mark
stories.summary: UCLA softball senior Megan Grant tied former Arizona star Laura Espinoza's 1995 record for the most home runs in NCAA single-season history with 37.

stories.title: McIlroy no longer against return of LIV golfers
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy is no longer opposed to LIV Golf players returning to the PGA Tour, but he said Friday that "it's a question of if they do want to come back."
